title: T-009 — Server Action updateFaCell + reset_built trigger wiring (NPD-a.4)
prompt:
# T-009 — updateFaCell Server Action + reset_built trigger wiring

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §7.4, §6.2 (downstream refresh), §2.2 (<dept>.write)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Provide updateFaCell(productCode, columnName, value) Server Action that respects per-dept RBAC, runs DB UPDATE, fires reset_built trigger when built=TRUE → FALSE, emits fa.edit event with diff payload.

## Implementation contract
Migration 0016 emits reset_built_on_edit() function + BEFORE UPDATE trigger on product per §7.4. Server Action apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/update-fa-cell.ts checks dept ownership of column via Reference.DeptColumns lookup, validates value via dynamic Zod from DeptColumns metadata, runs UPDATE in tx, emits fa.edit and (when applicable) fa.built_reset events. Returns {previousValue, newValue, builtReset:boolean}.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0016_reset_built_trigger.sql [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/update-fa-cell.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/__tests__/update-fa-cell.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given fa.built=TRUE and user updates fa.product_name to new value, when updateFaCell runs, then DB row has built=FALSE and one outbox_events row event_type='fa.built_reset' is written
2. Given user role planning_manager attempts to update fa.box (MRP col), when updateFaCell runs, then AuthError thrown (no MRP.write)
3. Given pack_size column changes, when updateFaCell runs, then a fa.edit event is emitted with payload.diff containing {pack_size: {prev, next}}

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 tests covering reset trigger, RBAC dept gate, edit event payload
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter web test update-fa-cell'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow blanket update of any column
- Do not skip the reset trigger when prod_detail edits land
- Do not emit fa.built_reset if built was already FALSE

pipeline_inputs.description: updateFaCell Server Action + DB trigger that resets built=FALSE on any product or prod_detail edit per §7.4.
pipeline_inputs.details: DB migration adds BEFORE UPDATE trigger emitting outbox row when built flips TRUE→FALSE. Server Action enforces per-dept RBAC via DeptColumns lookup, runs UPDATE in transaction, emits fa.edit always and fa.built_reset when applicable.
out_of_scope: Do not implement cascade chains here (T-010..T-013)
Do not build dept proxy view UI here (T-019)
acceptance_criteria: Given fa.built=TRUE and user updates fa.product_name, when updateFaCell runs, then DB row has built=FALSE and one outbox_events row event_type='fa.built_reset' is written
Given user role planning_manager updates fa.box, when updateFaCell runs, then AuthError thrown (no MRP.write)
Given pack_size column changes, when updateFaCell runs, then a fa.edit event is emitted with payload.diff containing the prev/next values
test_strategy: RED: 3 tests covering reset trigger, RBAC dept gate, edit event payload before action+trigger exist
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter web test update-fa-cell'
risk_red_lines: Do not allow blanket column updates without dept ownership check
Do not skip trigger application to prod_detail edits
Do not emit fa.built_reset when built was already FALSE
